query:
ALTER TABLE macro_signals 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS direction ENUM('tailwind', 'headwind') DEFAULT 'tailwind',
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS magnitude TINYINT DEFAULT 5,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS time_horizon_months INT DEFAULT 12,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affected_naics JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS affected_geography JSON,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS active_from BIGINT,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS active_to BIGINT;
